lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: I'm working. What do you have to say that's so urgent?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you tell me about Al Kharid?

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: There's a lot of space here. More open space than back home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where is back home?

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: Pollnivneach. It's a town to the south of the Shantay Pass.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what do you do here?

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: I'm on guard duty. Making sure nobody tries to steal anything from the house and tents in the middle of town.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you only guarding those buildings?

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: That's all I've been hired to guard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear you work for Ali Morrisane...

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: Yeah, he hired me. He owns this house and these two tents, too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is the work good?

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: It pays better than back home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why, what did you do back home?

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: Never you mind.

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: But Ali Morrisane pays us well, at least.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe I should talk to him...

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: Why not? He always likes to meet potential business partners.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear you've been threatening the other shopkeepers.

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: So? They talk too much.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not going to deny it?

lines.speaker: Ali the Guard
lines.text: Why bother? None of them can fight back, after all.
